chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-59 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 26.01.2026 Mir Murtaza Rajar, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with SIP Dili Jan Rind PS Qasimabad on behalf of SHO Qasimabad (Respondent No.4), and SHO PS Moro (Respondent No.3) ----- Petitioners are called absent. Counsel for the petitioners submits that the petitioners are not in his contact. However, he alleges harassment at the hands of police officials at the behest of private Respondents. Pursuant to order dated 12.01.2026, comments of Respondents No.2 to 4 have been filed comments, which are taken on record. The police officials present in Court deny having caused any harassment to the Petitioners; however, they submit that they shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioners. They further submit no FIR has been lodged in respect of freewill marriage of the petitioners. Learned AAG submits that official respondents shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the Petitioners, as and when required. In view of above, learned counsel for the petitioners, being satisfied, seeks disposal of the instant petition. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves in accordance with law and to ensure protection to petitioners as and when approached. JUDGE Ali Haider
